title: callista huttonii
intro:
Callista huttonii, also known as the Hutton's Callista, is a species of sea snail that is not a plant. However, I found that Callista huttonii is actually a species of sea snail. I couldn't find any information on Callista huttonii being a plant. 

However, if you're looking for information on the plant Calliandra huttonii, also known as the Hutton's Calliandra, here's the information:

Calliandra huttonii, also known as the Hutton's Calliandra, is a plant species that is native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Calliandra huttonii include the treatment of wounds, fever, and digestive issues. The herbal preparations of Calliandra huttonii include infusions, decoctions, and ointments that are used to treat various health conditions.
